title: Elysia Presents: Lootr
body:
"Elysia Presents: Lootr" is a custom resourcepack that completely revamps Lootr's visuals and assets. All assets have been redone from scratch, down to the colour palette. Disclaimer: I am not affiliated with Lootr or its Dev Team.

The opened and unopened variants are also now discernible. I made sure to include details differentiating the two, you should be able to tell them apart even if your vision is in gray scale.
